rationale: Falsifiers 2.1 (lower capacity) and 2.2 (log scaling) pass across both seeds. Slope 0.1546 close to expected 0.1667 for c=0.5 CFT.
Open boundary Ising model shows poor physical convergence (fidelity ~0.01). Runner may need closed boundary variant. Heisenberg model failed (boundary condition mismatch).

F3.3 (model selection) fails across conditions. With A=4, log-linear preferred. With A=8, saturating preferred but insufficient delta to satisfy pass criteria. Need larger chi sweep or refined threshold logic.
Entropy scaling shows partition-dependent behavior. F3.2 (CV threshold) passes for A=8 but still inconclusive on model selection.
Not executed in this baseline run (deferred due to time budget).
next_test: For Claim 3P: Use closed boundary conditions to match MEMORY.md baseline (previous successful runs used different runner or parameters)
